physics_values.putting_feel: described as 'most realistic' by contemporary reviewers

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Golf sports simulation. No movement physics parameters documented in available sources. Game focuses on golf mechanics (putting, ball trajectory, courses) rather than character movement. Contemporary reviews praised realism of putting mechanics and overall gameplay feel but did not document quantitative physics values.
